issues.title: Create Codex issue intake command
issues.detail: Codex needs a direct command/API path for recording discovered issues with project, file, status, and activity metadata.
activity: CLI/API contract drafted for local issue intake.

issues.title: Persist issues in Git-friendly files
issues.detail: Issues should survive across machines by syncing through GitHub without requiring a hosted database.
activity: User requested GitHub push/pull sync across machines.

issues.title: Codex Companion interface approved
issues.detail: Use a Codex-like project sidebar, central issue list, and detail inspector as the primary app layout.
